prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MGA-BTOP-ROLL-CST Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: 1:48 Deluxe Futuron Space Monorail with Big Loop Toy Train Set for Kids Description: Construct a roller coaster with the Space HyperLoop Bullet Train Coaster Set.

Fasten those seat belts, because this roller coaster is on a straight track to fun. With 3 trains, a docking station, and a full loop, kids of all ages will be entertained for hours on end. The 49 piece set is easy to assemble, and the included sticker set provides for loads of customization.

This set comes with everything for a kid to make a grand futuristic space themed roller coaster. It features side locks to prevent the coaster from falling off and is easy to assemble.

This play set is packed with all you need to experience a wild ride right in your living room. Have hours of fun with this train set and your little one. Search Terms: kids mini car set car set toys for kids car table set for kids car set for kids car play set for kids mini car set for kids car set kids toy 50 piece set kids car set kids car toy set kids car toy set mini vehicle play set vehicle play set for kids Features: - Easy to Assemble | Comes with 3 trains | Ideal for Kids 5-12 years old | Scale 1:48 - 49 piece track allows endless customization options | Includes a full loop | Train Station - Endless fun to build around and add to your diecast toy cityscape - Customize the graphics how you want with the included logo decal sticker sheet - Perfect gift for boys for all ages this Christmas === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
